title: About me – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield
text_excerpt: About me – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield LAURENCE TURNER Home Latest news and views Contact and support Check if you are a constituent How to get in touch See what I can help with Office standards About me Get updates Donate About me I stood to be your MP to deliver better public services and better protections at work. I know what it takes to represent different communities. Before I was elected as MP in July 2024, I worked as head of policy at a trade union – the GMB - where I fought for better for working people every day. I changed the law to double sentences for abusers who sexually assault police officers, ambulance workers and firefighters. I campaigned for and delivered better pay for thousands of key workers. For me, making life better for working people is what the Labour Party should be about. I was elected with a mandate to fight for better public services. Those services were there for me when I needed them. I was a SEND kid who went on to become a senior trade unionist and ultimately run for Parliament. That’s why I am passionate about reforming the SEND system that is failing too many children and families. I know what it’s like to be a victim of serious violent crime and I will always stand for safer streets across our community. Birmingham needs MPs who will stand up for the city in Parliament. Most of my family are from south Birmingham and I live in Northfield. I will always fight for investment and opportunity in our communities. Since the election, I’ve fufilled my promises to restore an advertised constituency office, hold regular surgeries, and be a locally-based MP. All my resources are here, in Birmingham. I am one of the most active MPs in Parliament where I regularly raise constituency issues, and I scrutinise Government policy as a member of the Transport Select Committee. In Parliament, I chair the GMB trade union group of MPs and Labour’s backbench business group on Climate Change and Net Zero. I am also an officer of the following All Party Parliamentary Groups: West Midlands City Regions Transport Sustainable Plastics Belarus Archives and History I will always speak up for Birmingham Northfield in Parliament and fight for working people and the better public services that we need. Promoted by and on behalf of Laurence Turner of Terry Duffy House, 1 Thomas Street, B70 6NT Privacy policy Acceptable use policy Cookie Preferences This website was built at no cost to taxpayers with Quarto
